artifact: RCA report: inconclusive. SQL Lab could not be used in this run because the preliminary read-only probe returned HTTP 401 Missing Authorization Header, so I did not execute the drill queries or assert numeric contributors. The intended analysis compares March 1996 against the average of February and April 1996 by region, transaction type, and k_symbol. Based only on the task note, March is not a strong row-count outlier, so a true drop in total amount would most likely come from lower average amount per transaction rather than fewer transactions.

sql.month_summary: SELECT date_trunc('month', CAST(t.date AS DATE)) AS month, COUNT(*) AS txn_count, SUM(t.amount) AS total_amount, AVG(t.amount) AS avg_amount FROM trans t WHERE CAST(t.date AS DATE) >= DATE '1996-02-01' AND CAST(t.date AS DATE) < DATE '1996-05-01' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;
sql.region_drill: WITH m AS (SELECT CASE WHEN CAST(t.date AS DATE) >= DATE '1996-03-01' AND CAST(t.date AS DATE) < DATE '1996-04-01' THEN 'march' ELSE 'neighbor' END AS period, d."A3" AS region, SUM(t.amount) AS amount FROM trans t JOIN account a ON a.account_id=t.account_id JOIN district d ON d.district_id=a.district_id WHERE CAST(t.date AS DATE) >= DATE '1996-02-01' AND CAST(t.date AS DATE) < DATE '1996-05-01' GROUP BY 1,2) SELECT region, SUM(CASE WHEN period='march' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS march_amount, SUM(CASE WHEN period='neighbor' THEN amount ELSE 0 END)/2.0 AS neighbor_avg_amount, SUM(CASE WHEN period='march' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN period='neighbor' THEN amount ELSE 0 END)/2.0 AS gap FROM m GROUP BY region ORDER BY gap ASC;
sql.type_k_symbol_drill: WITH m AS (SELECT CASE WHEN CAST(t.date AS DATE) >= DATE '1996-03-01' AND CAST(t.date AS DATE) < DATE '1996-04-01' THEN 'march' ELSE 'neighbor' END AS period, t.type, COALESCE(t.k_symbol,'(blank)') AS k_symbol, SUM(t.amount) AS amount FROM trans t WHERE CAST(t.date AS DATE) >= DATE '1996-02-01' AND CAST(t.date AS DATE) < DATE '1996-05-01' GROUP BY 1,2,3) SELECT type, k_symbol, SUM(CASE WHEN period='march' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS march_amount, SUM(CASE WHEN period='neighbor' THEN amount ELSE 0 END)/2.0 AS neighbor_avg_amount, SUM(CASE WHEN period='march' THEN amount ELSE 0 END)-SUM(CASE WHEN period='neighbor' THEN amount ELSE 0 END)/2.0 AS gap FROM m GROUP BY type,k_symbol ORDER BY gap ASC;

sql.type_k_symbol_drill: WITH m AS (SELECT CASE WHEN CAST(t.date AS DATE) >= DATE '1996-03-01' AND CAST(t.date AS DATE) < DATE '1996-04-01' THEN 'march' ELSE 'neighbor' END AS period, t.type, COALESCE(t.k_symbol,'(blank)') AS k_symbol, SUM(t.amount) AS amount FROM trans t WHERE CAST(t.date AS DATE) >= DATE '1996-02-01' AND CAST(t.date AS DATE) < DATE '1996-05-01' GROUP BY 1,2,3) SELECT type, k_symbol, SUM(CASE WHEN period='march' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS march_amount, SUM(CASE WHEN period='neighbor' THEN amount ELSE 0 END)/2.0 AS neighbor_avg_amount, SUM(CASE WHEN period='march' THEN amount ELSE 0 END)-SUM(CASE WHEN period='neighbor' THEN amount ELSE 0 END)/2.0 AS gap FROM m GROUP BY type,k_symbol ORDER BY gap ASC;
